name: Sweetbreads with Lemon (Animalla Di Vitello Fritta Al Lim
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a deep skillet or pot to 350°F (175°C).
2. Dredge the sweetbreads in flour, shaking off excess.
3. Carefully lower the sweetbreads into the hot oil using tongs or a slotted spoon.
4. Fry until golden brown and crispy on both sides, about 3-4 minutes per side.
5. Remove the fried sweetbreads with a skimmer or slotted spoon and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
6. Serve immediately with lemon wedges for squeezing over the top.
